headline: BofA Kicks Off FIFA World Cup 2026™ With 2 Million Free Fan Bands and Fan Experiences Nationwide
summary: Bank of America, the Official Bank of FIFA World Cup 2026™, today announced the debut of 2 million custom, collectible BofA Fan Bands, starting June 11 across all 11 U.S. host cities.

headline: Bank of America's Real-Time Payments and Tokenized Deposits Push Could Be A Game Changer For BAC
summary: In early June 2026, Bank of America unveiled multiple initiatives, including a forthcoming cross-border real-time payments service and participation in a new tokenized deposit network alongside other major U.S. banks, while also issuing several fixed-rate senior unsecured notes and announcing regional leadership changes. Together, these moves highlight Bank of America’s push to modernize its payments infrastructure and reinforce its position in regulated digital finance while fine-tuning its...
